prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南开大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约3923名、3545名、4828名、3917名、4005名。近五年位次波动较大，2023年曾后移至4828名，2024年回升至3917名，2025年稳定在4005名附近，整体呈小幅波动、无明显单边趋势，2025年基准位次约4005名；南开大学在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年131人、2022年134人、2023年137人、2024年147人、2025年149人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划为148人，较2025年减少1人，属微幅缩招，对竞争影响极小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年分别位列第20、20、20、21、23、21名，稳居全国前25，属于顶尖高校层次，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及学术不端（生命科学学院院长论文造假被免职、多位教师被举报）及师德师风事件，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第36/106，评价「较热」，短视频平台关注度中等；2022年曾在河南出现投档断档，但山东未出现类似异常；南开大学拥有14个A-及以上学科，其中化学、数学、工商管理、应用经济学为A+，统计学、物理学、中国语言文学、生物学、理论经济学等为A，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 山东省2021–2026年考生总数分别为54.4万、59.5万、66.2万、66.6万、68.1万、72.0万，持续增长，2026年增幅明显，整体竞争加剧；省控线（普通类一段）2021–2025年分别为444、437、443、444、441分，波动极小，卷面难度稳定；南开大学位于天津市，非山东省内高校，无本地倾斜；山东省为生源大省，南开大学在山东招生人数约占其全国总计划的5%–7%，属重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在4000名附近小幅波动、2026年招生计划微幅缩招（148人较2025年减少1人）、山东省考生总数持续增长（2026年达72万）加剧竞争、声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热度等因素，各因素相互抵消后预计位次较2025年基准小幅前移。预测2026年最低录取位次约3979名，波动区间3525–4433名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程）
- 理科试验班（数学与智能省身班）（信息与计算科学）
- 法学（涉外法治试验班）
- 理科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（物理学、量子信息科学、化学、生物科学）
- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学、数据科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 中国语言文学类（汉语言文学、汉语国际教育）
- 工科试验班（信息科学与技术）（计算机科学与技术、物联网工程、信息安全、自动化、智能科学与技术、软件工程）
- 理科试验班（物理与光电信息技术工程）（物理学、应用物理学、光电信息科学与工程、电子信息科学与技术、微电子科学与工程、电子科学与技术、通信工程）
- 理科试验班（物质科学）（化学、应用化学、生物科学、材料物理、材料化学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（经济学、国际经济与贸易、财政学、商务经济学）
- 金融学类（金融学、保险学（保险与精算））
- 工科试验班（未来产业精英）（智能科学与技术、智能医学工程、新能源科学与工程、材料化学、生物技术）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）（本硕连读）
- 工商管理类（未来商业领导者计划）（工商管理、人力资源管理、财务管理、会计学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3979名，区间3525–4433名。位次在区间中上段（约3700名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（伯苓班、数学省身班、法学试验班）；位次在区间中段（约3700–4100名）建议以二档信息类、物理光电类为主，兼冲一档部分专业；位次在区间下段（约4100名以后）建议以三档经管类、工科试验班（未来产业精英）为主力，二档作为冲刺，确保录取。南开大学学科实力整体强劲，各档专业均有A类学科支撑，报考价值高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 3923, 3545, 4828, 3917, and 4005 respectively. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past five years, with a backward shift to 4828 in 2023, a recovery to 3917 in 2024, and stabilization around 4005 in 2025, showing minor fluctuations without a clear unilateral trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4005. Nankai University's enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shandong: 131 in 2021, 134 in 2022, 137 in 2023, 147 in 2024, and 149 in 2025, showing a gradual slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 148, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a minor contraction with minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, it ranked 20th, 20th, 20th, 21st, 23rd, and 21st from 2021 to 2026, consistently among the top 25, belonging to the top-tier university level with sustained appeal to candidates. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct (the dean of the School of Life Sciences was dismissed for paper fabrication, and multiple faculty members were reported) and teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 36/106, rated 'relatively hot', with moderate attention on short video platforms. In 2022, there was a filing gap in Henan, but no similar anomaly occurred in Shandong. Nankai University has 14 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Chemistry, Mathematics, Business Administration, and Applied Economics, and A in Statistics, Physics, Chinese Language and Literature, Biology, and Theoretical Economics, with strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates in Shandong Province from 2021 to 2026 was 544,000, 595,000, 662,000, 666,000, 681,000, and 720,000 respectively, showing continuous growth with a significant increase in 2026, intensifying overall competition. The provincial control line (general category first segment) from 2021 to 2025 was 444, 437, 443, 444, and 441 points, with minimal fluctuation and stable exam difficulty. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a university within Shandong Province, so there is no local preference. Shandong is a major source province, with Nankai University's enrollment in Shandong accounting for about 5%–7% of its total national plan, making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings fluctuating around 4000, the slight contraction in the 2026 enrollment plan (148, a decrease of 1 from 2025), the continuous growth in the number of candidates in Shandong Province (reaching 720,000 in 2026) intensifying competition, and the negative reputation incidents possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, these factors offset each other, and the ranking is expected to move slightly forward compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 3979, with a fluctuation range of 3525–4433.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Intelligence Xingshen Class) (Information and Computing Science)
- Law (International Rule of Law Experimental Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Physics, Quantum Information Science, Chemistry, Biological Science)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Data Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chinese Language and Literature Class (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Security, Automation, Intelligent Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (Physics, Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science) (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Science, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Economics Class (Economics, International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Business Economics)
- Finance Class (Finance, Insurance (Insurance and Actuarial Science))
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite) (Intelligent Science and Technology, Intelligent Medical Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Materials Chemistry, Biotechnology)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) (Bachelor-Master Continuous Program)
- Business Administration Class (Future Business Leaders Program) (Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Financial Management, Accounting, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3979, with a range of 3525–4433. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 3700) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Boling Class, Mathematics Xingshen Class, Law Experimental Class); those in the middle part (about 3700–4100) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 information and physics-optics classes, while also attempting some Tier 1 majors; those in the lower part (after about 4100) are advised to focus on Tier 3 economics/management and Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite) as main choices, with Tier 2 as a sprint target to ensure admission. Nankai University has strong overall disciplinary strength, with A-class disciplines supporting each tier of majors, offering high application value.
